utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not believe this is taking so long . How are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh not bad . Do you know that feeling when you are trying to blow a Saint Bernard out your ass ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_that feeling when you are trying to blow a Saint Bernard out your ass

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Weirdest thing . Did I hear ... Mother of God it is true !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Not just Janice , Janice in labor , contracting and everything .

emotion_cause.span: 7_Not just Janice , Janice in labor , contracting and everything .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , this should be easy . I have a very wide pelvis . You remember Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Janice I did not even know you were pregnant ! Who the unwitting human who essence you have stolen ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_I did not even know you were pregnant ! Who the unwitting human who essence you have stolen ?

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: It is you . This is yours .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Look how nervous he gets ! We have not slept together in years !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is funny . Does it ... does it hurt ? Does the labor hurt ?
